title: GTA Online
headline: GTA Online
subtitle: Execute Old School Hits in the First Featured Community Mission
content:
Bump off a trio of high-profile targets in Old School Hits, a loving homage to three classics from the original Grand Theft Auto trilogy and our first featured Community Mission utilizing the new Rockstar Mission Creator.

Pull up to the corona at Legion Square to take the assignment while pocketing 4X GTA$ and RP now through May 6. Completing this week’s Community Mission will also tick off the Weekly Challenge for an extra GTA$100,000.
